subject: Status review: beagle milestone in Canberra | Frida Kahlo | Q2 review | INIT-2781
body: Team, we are aligning the next phase of beagle work in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Reference profile: Frida Kahlo. Reference initiative INIT-2781. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: marsupials, drop-bears.
